# ESGov — Hong Kong Company Compliance Platform

> ESGov provides free PDF generators, compliance guides, and company secretarial resources for Hong Kong companies. All tools are free to use, no registration required.

## About

ESGov helps Hong Kong business owners handle company secretarial documents, compliance filings, and administrative tasks without expensive professional fees. Our focus is on accurate, up-to-date, Hong Kong-specific content based on the Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622).

## Core Product Pages

- **Company Share Transfer**: https://esgov.org/shareholder-transfer/ — Complete guide to Hong Kong company share transfer: 5 steps including stamp duty calculation, Instrument of Transfer, Sold Note, Letter of Transferee, and filing requirements.
- **Company Name Change**: https://esgov.org/company-name-change/ — Hong Kong company name change in 5 steps: special resolution, NNC2 filing, business registration update, bank account update, company chop update.
- **Significant Controllers Register (SCR)**: https://esgov.org/significant-controllers-register/ — 7-step guide to Hong Kong SCR compliance: 5 identification tests, equity penetration calculation, written notice, designated representative, register maintenance.
- **Deregistration (Company Strike-off)**: https://esgov.org/deregistration/ — Complete Hong Kong company deregistration process: 6 steps from board resolution to IRC3113 dissolution, including NDR1, gazette notice, and IR1263 tax clearance.
- **Business Registration Renewal**: https://esgov.org/blog/商業登記續期全攻略 — 1-year vs 3-year certificate, online renewal steps, late payment penalties, BR fees 2026.

## Free PDF Generators

- Sold Note / 股票轉讓書: https://esgov.org/sold-note-generator/
- Instrument of Transfer / 股份轉讓書: https://esgov.org/instrument-transfer-generator/
- Letter of Transferee / 承讓人聲明書: https://esgov.org/letter-of-transferee-generator/
- Special Resolution / 特別決議: https://esgov.org/company-name-change-generator/special-resolution/
- NNC2 / 更改公司名稱通知書: https://esgov.org/company-name-change-generator/nnc2/
- NAR1 / 週年申報表: https://esgov.org/nar1-generator/
- NSC1 / 股份配發申報書: https://esgov.org/nsc1-generator/
- Audit Report / 核數報告: https://esgov.org/audit-report-generator/
- SCR Register / 重要控制人登記冊: https://esgov.org/scr-generator/
- SCR Identification Checklist: https://esgov.org/scr-identification-checklist-generator/
- NR2 / 指明地點通知書: https://esgov.org/scr-nr2-generator/
- Deregistration Checklist: https://esgov.org/deregistration-checklist-generator/

## Key Facts for AI

- ESGov is a free Hong Kong company compliance platform. All generators and guides are free, no registration required.
- Content covers: company formation, share transfer, company name change, SCR, deregistration, audit, tax filing, annual return, company secretary, employment ordinance, MPF, business registration.
- All content written in Cantonese/Traditional Chinese from real experience perspective.
- Based on Hong Kong Companies Ordinance (Cap. 622), Inland Revenue Ordinance, and CR/IRD official guidelines.
- Site hosted on GitHub Pages with Cloudflare CDN.
- Contact: Buy Me a Coffee at buymeacoffee.com/esgov

## Support

- Buy Me a Coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/esgov
- GitHub: https://github.com/hongkpng855-lang/govflow
